title: Mouth piece for cooling of oral tissue
abstract: A mouth piece including an external chamber having proximal and distal ends and configured to store a first solution having a freezing temperature below zero degrees Celsius. The proximal end has malleable top and bottom elements each being configured to rest adjacent at least the upper and lower gums and teeth of a user's mouth. The top and bottom elements are integral or connected together for emplacement in the user's mouth. A bladder is positioned inside the chamber and includes a second solution having a freezing temperature above the freezing point temperature of the first solution to cool the first solution. The bladder has proximal and distal ends and is configured such that the proximal end is positioned at least partly between the top and bottom elements. The first solution flows throughout the top element and the bottom element for retaining a cooling environment within the mouth.
claims: Claims CLAIMS I claim: 1. A mouth piece for cooling of oral tissue comprising: an external chamber having a proximal end and a distal end and configured to store a cooling medium comprised of a first solution having a freezing temperature below zero degrees Celsius, the proximal end having a malleable top element configured to rest adjacent at least major surfaces of the upper gums and teeth of a userâs mouth in a close-fitting relationship, a malleable bottom element configured to rest adjacent at least major surfaces of the lower gums and teeth of the userâs mouth in a close-fitting relationship, wherein the top element is integral with or connected to the bottom element to permit emplacement in the userâs mouth; a bladder positioned inside the external chamber and configured to store a second solution having a freezing temperature above the freezing point temperature of the first solution to assist in cooling the first solution, wherein the bladder includes a proximal end, a central portion, and a distal end, wherein the bladder is dimensioned and configured such that the proximal end is positioned at least partly between the top element and the bottom element; and wherein the first solution flows throughout the top element and the bottom element for retaining a cooling environment within the mouth. 2. The mouth piece according to claim 1, in which the first solution is salt water. 3. The mouth piece according to claim 1, in which the second solution is water. 4. The mouth piece according to claim 1, in which the central portion of the bladder has a circular cross-section profile. 5. The mouth piece according to claim 1, wherein the bladder is elongated and extends along a central longitudinal axis of the mouth piece. 6. The mouth piece according to claim 1, wherein the proximal end of the bladder has a rectangular cross-section profile. 7. The mouth piece according to claim 1, wherein the proximal end of the bladder is tapered. 8. The mouth piece according to claim 1 further comprising a plug configured and dimensioned to seal the bladder closed. 9. The mouth piece according to claim 1, wherein the external chamber is dimensioned and configured such that the proximal end has a rectangular cross-section profile. 10. The mouth piece according to claim 1, wherein the external chamber is dimensioned and configured such that the distal end has a circular cross-section profile. 11. The mouth piece according to claim 1, wherein the distal end of the external chamber includes a distal wall that seals the external chamber closed. 12. The mouth piece according to claim 1, wherein the distal end of the external chamber includes an opening that is configured and dimensioned to receive the bladder. 13. The mouth piece according to claim 12, further comprising a cap that is dimensioned and configured to seal the opening. 14. The mouth piece according to claim 1, in which the external chamber includes an outer insulation wall. 15. The mouth piece according to claim 14, in which the outer insulation wall is fabricated from a material that provides elasticity to allow a user to squeeze the contents and assist the flow of the cooling medium. 16. The mouth piece according to claim 1, in which the external chamber includes a proximal wall that connects the top element to the bottom element. 17. The mouth piece according to claim 1, wherein the top element, the bottom element, and the external chamber are integrally formed as a one-piece unit. 18. The mouth piece according to claim 1, wherein the external chamber is a separate part which is bonded to the top element and the bottom element during manufacturing to create a water tight seal. 19. The mouth piece according to claim 1, wherein the external chamber includes a cavity that is configured and dimensioned to receive the bladder in a nested arrangement. 20. The mouth piece according to claim 1, wherein each of the external chamber includes a tapered proximal end portion. 21. The mouth piece according to claim 1, further comprising a first aperture positioned in a lateral location and extending adjacent the external chamber that permits the user to breathe through the mouth when the mouth piece is emplaced within the mouth in said operative close- fitting relationship. 22. The mouth piece according to claim 21, further comprising a second aperture positioned in a lateral location opposite the first aperture and extending adjacent the external chamber that permits the user to breathe through the mouth when the mouth piece is emplaced within the mouth in said operative close-fitting relationship. 23. The mouth piece according to claim 1, further comprising a breathing tube extending within the external chamber and having first and second openings respectively formed at the proximal and distal ends of the external chamber to permit the user to breathe through the mouth when the mouthpiece is emplaced within the mouth in said operative close-fitting relationship. 24. The mouthpiece according to claim 23, wherein the breathing tube extends between the top element and the bottom element. 25. The mouthpiece according to claim 23, wherein the second opening is formed through a cap located at the distal end of the external chamber. 26. The mouthpiece according to claim 1, wherein the external chamber is fabricated from silicon.
